sections.paragraph: prop. number (contr. from מִכְסָה, like מַס which see, for מֶכֶס, root כָּסַס), constr. מִסַּת prep. according to the number, i.e. at the rate of, even as (Syr. ܡܶܣܬܰ, Chald. בְּמִסַּת for Hebr. בְּדֵי, דֵּי). Deu 16:10, מִסַּת נִדְבַת יָדְֽךָ “even as thy hand can give.” LXX. καθὼς ἡ χείρ σου ἰσχύει.
